stories.name: update-release-workflow-for-dmg
stories.title: Update release workflow to produce .dmg artifacts
stories.description: Modify .github/workflows/release.yml to: (1) install tauri-cli before building, (2) replace cargo build with cargo tauri build, (3) add DMG packaging and checksum step for macOS, (4) add *.dmg and *.dmg.sha256 to the upload files list, (5) update release body with DMG installation instructions. Linux workflow remains unchanged.

includes: Install Tauri CLI step (before Build release)
Build release step: cargo tauri build at project root
Package macOS step: add DMG + checksum handling
Release body: update macOS instructions with DMG details

stories.notes: This is a CI/CD YAML-only change. No application code is modified. Verification is static analysis of the workflow YAML. The e2e_test_plan below reflects that this workflow cannot be executed locally; instead, YAML structural correctness is verified.
